children.text: acquisition or development of land and improvements for use for a public works, public service, or development facility or for the improvement of waste management and recycling systems; and

acquisition, design and engineering, construction, rehabilitation, alteration, expansion, increasing the resilience or improvement of such a facility, including related machinery and equipment.1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.label: A
children.text: improve the opportunities, in the area where the project is or will be located, for the successful establishment, expansion, or retention, of industrial or commercial plants or facilities;2So in original. The comma probably should not appear.2

children.label: B
children.text: assist in the creation of additional long-term employment opportunities in the area; or

children.label: C
children.text: primarily benefit the long-term unemployed and underemployed and members of low-income families;
the project for which the grant is applied for will fulfill a pressing need of the area, or a part of the area, in which the project is or will be located; and
the area for which the project is to be carried out has a comprehensive economic development strategy and the project is consistent with the strategy.
lead to economic diversification in the area, or a part of the area, in which the project is or will be located;
address and mitigate economic impacts from extreme weather events, including development of resilient infrastructure, products, and processes;
benefit highly rural communities without adequate tax revenues to invest in long-term or costly infrastructure;
support outdoor recreation to spur economic development, with a focus on rural communities;
promote job creation or retention relative to the population of the impacted region with outsized significance;

children.heading: Maximum assistance for each State
children.label: d Maximum assistance for each State
children.text: Not more than 15 percent of the amounts made available to carry out this section may be expended in any 1 State.
